events.title: David Finckel, cello and Wu Han, piano
events.description: A captivating chamber music performance by renowned cellist David Finckel and pianist Wu Han. Expect an evening of classical repertoire and artistic brilliance.

events.title: OASIS Graduate Community Care Lounge
events.location: OASIS Graduate Community Care Lounge, UC Berkeley
events.description: A drop-in community care lounge for graduate and professional students, offering light refreshments and guided reflection. Part of Graduate & Professional Student Appreciation Week.

events.title: Mini Book Fair: Career Exploration and Preparation
events.description: Explore resources for career development and preparation at this mini book fair tailored for graduate students.

events.title: BIDS Cultural Analytics Series: 'AI and Post-Artificial Texts'
events.description: A seminar exploring the impact of AI on text generation and the reader's evolving expectations in a post-artificial era.

events.title: Post Ramadan Market
events.organizer: ASUC Student Union & Muslim Student Association
events.description: Celebrate the end of Ramadan with a vibrant market featuring Muslim-inspired food, local vendors, and crafts.

events.title: Breakfast at the Graduate Assembly
events.description: Start your day with a free breakfast and network with fellow graduate students at the Graduate Assembly.

events.title: Career Counseling 1:1's Drop Ins
events.description: Drop-in for one-on-one career counseling sessions with Daniel Shaw from UC Berkeley Career Engagement. No appointment needed.

events.title: The Library TOTES Appreciates You!
events.description: A special event from the UC Berkeley Library to show appreciation for students and faculty. Enjoy light refreshments and library resources.

events.title: Kamran Anwar | Songs of the Sufi: The Untold Story of Classical Qawwali
events.description: An engaging lecture and performance delving into the rich history and spiritual depth of classical Qawwali music.

events.title: Coffee with Grad Div at the Gate
events.description: Casual coffee and conversation with representatives from the Graduate Division at The Gate.

events.title: 2026 Herb Caen Lecture: Press Freedom in Peril
events.description: The annual Herb Caen Lecture focusing on critical issues facing press freedom today.

events.title: Moving Inland: Coastal and Mountain Landscapes in Cyprus' Hunter-Gatherer Past
events.location: Phoebe A. Hearst Museum of Anthropology, UC Berkeley
events.description: A lecture exploring ancient landscapes and human activities in Cyprus during the hunter-gatherer period.

events.title: Arbitraging China's platform economy in the Silicon Savannah
events.description: A seminar discussing the intersection of China's digital economy and its influence in Africa.

events.title: Ableism When Accessing the Past: Studies of Disability in the Ancient World (Hannah Vogel)
events.description: Hannah Vogel presents her research on the study of disability in ancient civilizations.

events.title: Salud y Ciencia: Latinx Leaders in Public Health
events.organizer: UC Berkeley School of Public Health
events.location: Li Ka Shing Center, UC Berkeley
events.description: A panel discussion featuring prominent Latinx leaders in the field of public health, sharing their experiences and insights.

events.title: First-Generation Graduate Student Mixer
events.location: Anna Head Alumnae Hall, UC Berkeley
events.description: A social mixer for first-generation graduate students to connect and build community.

events.title: Intramural Volleyball League Match: Net Assets vs. Spikeology (Recreational)
events.description: Recreational intramural volleyball league match. Open to all skill levels for fun and participation.

events.title: International Conference on Big Data Computer Science and Information (ICBDCSI)
events.description: A conference bringing together researchers and professionals to discuss advancements in Big Data, Computer Science, and Information.

events.title: Tibor Szilvasi: Enabling the Next Level of Understanding in Heterogeneous Catalysis Using Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials
events.description: A seminar on leveraging machine learning to enhance understanding in heterogeneous catalysis.

events.title: Lunch Poems: Tonya Foster
events.location: Morrison Library, Doe Library, UC Berkeley
events.description: A poetry reading featuring acclaimed poet Tonya Foster as part of the Lunch Poems series.

events.title: Language and Colonial Legacies in Portuguese Higher Education
events.organizer: UC Berkeley Department of Spanish and Portuguese
events.description: A discussion on the historical impact of colonial legacies on language and education in Portuguese-speaking universities.

events.title: Graduate Student Patio Party
events.organizer: UC Berkeley Graduate Division & Graduate Social Club
events.description: Bring friends to enjoy tasty bites, games, and music at this social gathering for graduate students.

events.title: Robert Habeck and Andrea Paluch | Writing Together - How We Did It
events.description: A discussion with authors Robert Habeck and Andrea Paluch on their collaborative writing process.

events.title: STEM*FYI Flowers & Falafel
events.description: Craft your own bouquet, enjoy Mediterranean food, and connect with fellow grad students.

events.title: Spring Painting at the School of Optometry
events.description: An opportunity for students and staff to engage in a relaxing and creative painting session.

events.title: Intramural Flag Football League Match: Gridiron Gauntlets vs. Touchdown Titans
events.description: Competitive flag football league match between two intramural teams.

events.title: Games (Board + Matching) & Pizza + Boba Night
events.description: Enjoy an evening of board games, matching games, pizza, and boba with fellow graduate students.

events.title: The “PhD-fense” Strategy Night (Game Night)
events.description: A fun and strategic game night for PhD students to unwind and socialize.

events.title: 2026 Fotovision Lecture: An Evening with Ed Kashi
events.description: An evening with acclaimed photojournalist Ed Kashi, sharing his work and insights.

events.title: Berkeley Founders' Workshop: Crafting Your Pitch Deck
events.description: A hands-on workshop for aspiring entrepreneurs on how to create compelling pitch decks for investors. This event helps students develop essential startup skills.

events.title: Startup Showcase & Networking Reception
events.location: Chou Hall, Spieker Forum, UC Berkeley
events.description: Discover innovative startups from UC Berkeley students and connect with founders, investors, and industry leaders.

events.title: BAMPFA Film Screening: Classic French New Wave
events.organizer: Berkeley Art Museum and Pacific Film Archive (BAMPFA)
events.description: A screening of an influential film from the French New Wave movement, exploring its artistic impact.

events.title: Intramural Ultimate Frisbee Match: Disc-o Inferno vs. Flying Squirrels
events.description: An exciting intramural ultimate frisbee match, promoting teamwork and active recreation.

events.title: CrafterDark at Anchor House
events.description: Weekly craft session for students to unleash their creativity and unwind. Free crafting and art making.

events.title: Cal Men's Tennis vs. Stanford
events.description: Watch the Cal Men's Tennis team compete against rival Stanford in a high-stakes match.

events.title: Innovation Challenge Info Session
events.description: Learn about upcoming innovation challenges and how to participate, fostering creativity and problem-solving skills.

events.title: Grad Slam 2026 Campuswide Competition
events.location: Banatao Auditorium, Sutardja Dai Hall, UC Berkeley
events.description: Nine Berkeley semi-finalists present their research in engaging three-minute talks. Free refreshments will be available.

events.title: BSAC Research Review Oral Presentation: New Sensing Modalities for Wearable Sweat Sensors
events.location: Jarvis Auditorium, Grimes Engineering Center, UC Berkeley
events.description: Oral presentation on the latest research in wearable sweat sensor technologies.

events.title: BSAC Research Review Oral Presentation: 3D-Printed Metamaterial Tactile Sensors
events.location: Jarvis Auditorium, Grimes Engineering Center, UC Berkeley
events.description: Oral presentation on advanced 3D-printed metamaterial tactile sensors for robotics.

events.title: BSAC Research Review Oral Presentation: Scalable Quantum Information Processing
events.location: Jarvis Auditorium, Grimes Engineering Center, UC Berkeley
events.description: Oral presentation on scalable approaches to quantum information processing using additive manufacturing.

events.title: Cal Women's Softball vs. UCLA
events.description: Cheer on the Cal Women's Softball team as they face off against UCLA.

events.title: BSAC Tutorial: Rapid Design and Printing of MEMS-Like Electronic Materials
events.location: Jarvis Auditorium, Grimes Engineering Center, UC Berkeley
events.description: A tutorial on rapid design and printing techniques for micro-electro-mechanical systems (MEMS) and electronic materials.

events.title: UC Berkeley Jazz Ensemble Spring Concert
events.description: The UC Berkeley Jazz Ensemble performs their annual Spring Concert, featuring a diverse repertoire.

events.title: Crafter Dark – DIY Shirt Patches
events.location: 1st Floor of MLK Jr. Building, Game Zone Area, UC Berkeley
events.description: Take a break and make your own DIY shirt patches in this creative craft session.

events.title: BETR/EECS Solid State Technologies Seminar: Topology Meets Nonlinear Optics
events.location: Hogan Room, Cory Hall (room 521), UC Berkeley
events.description: Professor Mohammad Hafezi discusses new frontiers in nanophotonic devices through the lens of topology and nonlinear optics.

events.title: Cultural Analytics Discussion with Kyle Booten
events.description: An in-person, collaborative deep dive with Cultural Analytics speaker Kyle Booten.

events.title: Movie Night at Headlands - Legally Blonde
events.description: Enjoy an evening screening of 'Legally Blonde', a charming, empowering, and witty film.

events.title: Intramural Dodgeball Tournament (Sign-ups close)
events.description: Sign-ups close today for the upcoming intramural dodgeball tournament. Form your teams and get ready to play!

events.title: Legal Essentials for Startups: IP & Contracts
events.location: Berkeley Law School, Room 100, UC Berkeley
events.description: A workshop covering crucial legal aspects for startups, including intellectual property and contract agreements.

events.title: Commence Your Career: Connecting Seniors & Alums
events.description: An interactive event connecting graduating students with Cal alums for career-building conversations and opportunities.

events.title: Cal Men's Baseball vs. Oregon
events.description: Catch the Cal Men's Baseball team in action against the Oregon Ducks.

events.title: Venture Capital Panel: Funding Your Next Big Idea
events.organizer: Haas School of Business, Energy Institute
events.location: Haas School of Business, Wells Fargo Room, UC Berkeley
events.description: A panel discussion with leading venture capitalists on securing funding for early-stage startups.

events.title: EECS Colloquium | Can AI assist in Mathematics and Computer Science research?
events.location: 310 (Banatao Auditorium) - Sutardja Dai Hall, UC Berkeley
events.description: A colloquium exploring the potential of AI to aid research in mathematics and computer science.

events.title: Cybersecurity Spring 2026 Capstone Project Showcase
events.description: Graduating MICS students present their cybersecurity capstone projects, demonstrating innovative solutions and research.

events.title: OSPO Monthly Meetup: April
events.organizer: UC Berkeley CDSS Open Source Program Office (OSPO)
events.description: A monthly meetup to shape the future of open source at UC Berkeley, featuring a fireside chat and networking.

events.title: BETR/EECS Solid State Technologies Seminar: Direct Atomic Layer Processing (DALP®)
events.location: Hogan Room, Cory Hall (room 521), UC Berkeley
events.description: Dr. Mira Baraket discusses DALP® for spatially localized, multi-material fabrication in next-generation devices.

events.title: Design Thinking for Entrepreneurs Workshop
events.location: Sutardja Dai Hall, Banatao Auditorium, UC Berkeley
events.description: A hands-on workshop on applying design thinking principles to entrepreneurial ventures and product development.

events.title: Social Impact Startup Accelerator Launch
events.location: Blum Center for Developing Economies, UC Berkeley
events.description: Launch event for a new accelerator program supporting startups focused on social impact and global development.

events.title: Community Day (Student Organizations)
events.description: Explore various student organizations and learn about opportunities to get involved in campus life.

events.title: CRELS speaker series with Simone Zhang: 'Scoring Justice'
events.description: Simone Zhang presents on risk assessment tools, court practices, and fairness perceptions in the CRELS speaker series.

events.title: EECS Colloquium/CLIMB Seminar | Formal Models of Language Generation
events.location: Banatao Auditorium, 310 Sutardja Dai Hall, UC Berkeley
events.description: A joint colloquium and CLIMB seminar on the development and application of formal models for language generation.

events.title: Data Science Spring 2026 Capstone Project Showcase
events.organizer: UC Berkeley School of Information & CDSS
events.description: Graduating MIDS students showcase their innovative data science capstone projects.

events.title: mcbUSA Undergraduate Research Symposium
events.organizer: mcbUSA (Molecular & Cell Biology Undergraduate Student Association)
events.location: Tilden Room, Martin Luther King Jr. Student Union, UC Berkeley
events.description: Undergraduate students present their scientific research, including posters and discussions with faculty.

events.title: BETR/EECS Solid State Technologies Seminar: Magic State Cultivation
events.location: Hogan Room, Cory Hall (room 521), UC Berkeley
events.description: Dr. Emma Rosenfeld from Google Quantum AI discusses magic state cultivation on a superconducting quantum processor.

events.title: Blockchain for Business: Opportunities & Challenges
events.location: Sutardja Dai Hall, CITRIS Invention Lab, UC Berkeley
events.description: A seminar exploring the applications, opportunities, and challenges of blockchain technology in a business context.

events.title: Earth Day Celebration
events.location: Lawrence Hall of Science, Berkeley, CA
events.description: Join community partners and UC Berkeley student organizations for the third-annual Earth Day celebration. Features climate science activities and a live performance by Alphabet Rockers.

events.title: Tech Day
events.organizer: UC Berkeley Society of Women Engineers (SWE)
events.description: A day-long conference for middle school female and non-binary students to explore computer science and technology through workshops and panels.

events.title: AI & Ethics in Entrepreneurship Seminar
events.location: Memorial Stadium, University Club, UC Berkeley
events.description: A seminar discussing the ethical considerations and societal impact of artificial intelligence in entrepreneurship.

events.title: Drag Bingo
events.description: The final Drag Bingo of the spring semester, promising a night of laughter, prizes, and treats.

events.title: OSPO Monthly Knowledge Exchange: May
events.organizer: UC Berkeley CDSS Open Source Program Office (OSPO)
events.description: The monthly knowledge exchange to foster open source initiatives and collaboration within the UC Berkeley community.

events.title: Intramural Soccer League Match: Bears vs. Golden Goats (CoRec)
events.description: A co-recreational intramural soccer league match, bringing together students for friendly competition.

events.title: Intramural Basketball League Match: Court Kings vs. Hoop Dreams (Open)
events.description: An open competitive intramural basketball game, showcasing student athletic talent.
